note: Minimal conflict fixtures for the proportionality/precedence layer in fable_lint. Each bad case combines two discipline lines that conflict unless the requested priority line is present. Each good case is the same discipline with the resolving line added.

cases.text: Act immediately and do the work without asking. Safety review, approval prompts, and project rules are useful but should not slow decisive execution.
Act when you have enough to act. Safety, approval prompts, destructive-action caution, and explicit project rules outrank decisiveness.
Apply a strict length cap to every response. Ground every progress claim and include a Decision trail for multi-step work.
Apply a strict length cap to prose only; never cut P5 evidence checks or P7 Decision trail duties when those duties apply.
No filler and minimal markdown: skip empty preamble. Add preambles and progress notes so users see activity.

No filler and minimal markdown: preambles and progress notes are gated by task length. Single-step work stays silent; three-or-more-step work may use one short preamble plus factual notes. Never narrate private reasoning.
Use early-stop to limit search after the first plausible result. Ground every claim in evidence from files or tools.
Use early-stop to limit search breadth only, never grounding depth. Ground every claim in evidence from files or tools.
After every edit, always run the full test, lint, typecheck, and build suite. Verification is mandatory for every change.
Verification strength scales with blast radius: trivial text-only edits can skip tests, local behavior changes get targeted checks, and shared contracts get broader verification.
No filler and minimal markdown: skip empty preamble. Add preambles and progress notes to every work item. After every edit, always run the full build and test suite before reporting.

No filler and minimal markdown. Preambles and progress notes are gated by task length: single-step work stays silent; three-or-more-step work may use one short preamble plus factual notes, and private reasoning is never narrated. Verification strength scales with blast radius: trivial text-only edits can skip tests, local behavior changes get targeted checks, and shared contracts get broader verification.
